data.title: Immunocore (IMCR): KIMMTRAK’s Durable Survival Benefit in Metastatic Uveal Melanoma Underpins Sustainable Growth and $100 Buy Rating
data.description:
H.C. Wainwright analyst Patrick Trucchio has reiterated their bullish stance on IMCR stock, giving a Buy rating today.

Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Patrick Trucchio has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors tied to KIMMTRAK’s strong, durable survival benefit in metastatic uveal melanoma. Five-year data from the Phase 3 study show that patients on KIMMTRAK lived meaningfully longer than those on investigator’s choice, with survival curves separating early and staying apart, and the advantage seen across most patient subsets, regardless of tumor location or initial disease burden.

Trucchio also underscores that the survival gains appear primarily driven by tebentafusp itself rather than subsequent treatments, reinforcing KIMMTRAK’s role as the frontline standard for HLA-A*02:01-positive patients. With these best-in-class, long-term results, real-world data expected later this year, and KIMMTRAK’s expanding commercial reach and pipeline leverage beyond uveal melanoma, he views Immunocore as having a sustainable revenue base that warrants a Buy rating and supports his $100 price target on IMCR.

In another report released today, Oppenheimer also maintained a Buy rating on the stock with a $86.00 price target.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
